ddls:
CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the component (e.g., LDO1, LDO2) */,
  "initial_voltage" TEXT /* Initial voltage of the component */,
  "control_range" TEXT /* Control range of the component */,
  "max_current" TEXT /* Maximum current of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the component belongs to */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component's datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1, 2.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the pin belongs to */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., input, output, power) */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Description of the pin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_comments_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tags_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
